$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: S227 cross-track merge production-readiness → main — types bumped 11→15 to absorb 4 new main-track handler types: `BatchReclassifyResult` + `BatchReclassifyAuthContext` from S225 §5.4.2 batch-reclassify handler (`lib/queue/handlers/batch-reclassify.ts`); `MarkdownBatchResult` + `MarkdownBatchAuthContext` from S226 §5.4.4 markdown-batch handler (`lib/queue/handlers/markdown-batch.ts`). Same precedent as S225 baseline bump (8→11 for `BidDraftAllQuestionResult`/`BidDraftAllResult`/`BidDraftAllAuthContext` from §5.4.1 bid-draft-all handler). Exports bumped 38→41 to absorb 3 new main-track exports: `contentTypeSortKey` (S225 batch-reclassify handler internal helper exported for test access); `HEADING_PATTERNS` (pre-existing source-document diff constants exposed for tests); `computeGapSummary` (held back from S31 W4 Knip cleanup per vi.mock factory risk; main S225+ work surfaced it for test consumption). Prior S225 cross-track merge — types bumped 8→11 to absorb the 3 main-track S224 W4-IMPL handler types in `lib/queue/handlers/bid-draft-all.ts` (`BidDraftAllQuestionResult`, `BidDraftAllResult`, `BidDraftAllAuthContext`). Same precedent as S31 W4's SKIP on `lib/queue/enqueue.ts` types — main-track owns §5.4 queue handler authoring contracts which are exported for `lib/queue/dispatch.ts` consumption + test mocking shape parity (V_W4 verifier note: "3 unused exported types in `bid-draft-all.ts` — W4-C tests consume"). Prior kh-prod-readiness-S31 W4 — OPS-50 Wave B Knip baseline cleanup. Sub-bucket 1 (BACKWARD-COMPAT-REEXPORT delete): trimmed 5 re-export blocks. Sub-bucket 2 (PUBLIC-API @public marking): added knip.config.ts `tags: ['-public']` rule and marked ~225 entries with @public JSDoc. Sub-bucket 3 (GENUINELY-DEAD delete): removed dead types/schemas. Skipped lib/queue/enqueue.ts and 2 bid-template routes per main-track S223 ownership.
